{{CargoRelic
|name=Cryptonite
|class_id=20040
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=Defeat [[Mailbox#Ratman|Ratman]]
|description=This is a unique item in this pay-to-win game. It simply deals a huge amount of damage to certain opponents with off-the-charts stats. This is to level the playing field for all kinds of players because the devs know that the game won't last if recharging can do anything!
|fame=12
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=17
|tech=30
|ss1=Against Flying Man, DMG +500%<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss2=Against Flying Man, DMG +500%<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +6<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss3=Against Flying Man, DMG +500%<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +9<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss4=Against Flying Man, DMG +500%<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +9<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000
|ss7=Against Flying Man, DMG +500%<br>Per 1k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +9<br>Tadpole Points: 20000/20000<br> (Awakened)
}}
